title: phyllanthus martinii
intro: Phyllanthus martinii, also known as Jiao Gu Lan, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus martinii include reducing liver inflammation, protecting against liver damage, and improving liver function, as well as supporting cardiovascular health. Phyllanthus martinii is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as capsules, teas, and decoctions, and is often consumed as a supplement to promote overall health and well-being.
